column8: Papers (deliver) usually at 8 in the morning, they (look through) at the moment and you’ll get yours soon.
column9: Dresses (make) preferably of cotton in hot countries. This wonderful costume (make) specially for this performance now.
column10: What strange sounds! – Oh, our piano (tune).
column11: Where is your car? – It (fill) in the garage at the moment.
column12: Tea (lay) usually on the balcony in fine weather.
column13: We are finishing the last preparations for the party: the lights (switch on), the floors (clean), the tables (lay). Do you think we’ll be ready on time?
column14: I’ve got two questions to you. First: “What language (speak) all over the world?” Second: “What language (speak) in this room?”
column15: The witness (question) by the police-inspector now.
column16: The old motorway (use) by many people, but it’s not very convenient, that’s why a new ring-road (build) in the city.
column17: Our luggage (examine) at the Customs now. Any luggage going abroad (check) usually here.
